title: Grounding with Google Maps
summary: Attach Google Maps as a tool with an optional caller location. The model returns place results — title, URI, place ID — through grounding_metadata.
notes: lat_lng on RetrievalConfig is optional — without it the tool still answers, but 'near me' style prompts work much better when it's set.
Each grounding_chunk carries a maps object with title, uri, and placeId — placeId is the stable Google Places identifier you should persist if you plan to look up further details client-side.
Maps grounding bills as a per-request fee on top of token usage; refer to the pricing page for the current rate.
